Let me just make a prediction here cause I got a couple theories. The lady in the yard is actually death itself. She isn’t good or bad, just there to inform the guy’s wife that he died in an accident. I don’t think she’s the villain. I think it’s gonna be a murder mystery where she helps the wife figure out how her husband died and tracks down the ones responsible, maybe even getting revenge by giving the lady information or clues to help her.

Another theory I have is that the whole thing is a setup by the husband. He’s not actually dead. He staged everything to accomplish something specific or to make his wife take the fall for a crime he couldn’t commit himself without ending up in prison. She’d look insane because telling people she’s been talking to some woman in the yard would sound completely schizo.

Another possibility is that she actually is crazy and responsible for her husband’s murder. The lady in the yard is there for revenge because she represents death itself

And the last theory? The woman is just some demon, and the whole movie is nothing but a cliche, low-effort horror cash grab with zero thought put into it.

Ok, I will start off by saying my mother passed about 10 years ago so no way I can reverify what she told me.  Everyone else involved has either passed or has dementia.

Now my mother grew up in rural Georgia.  She had about 4 other siblings (1 brother, 3 sisters).  I assume they may have been between 5 and 14 years old.  My grandmother died giving birth to my youngest aunt and my grandfather worked on the railroads, so they kids were mainly left to themselves to raise each other.

Now they lived in a one room farmhouse.  I went to see it once and it was in the middle of nowhere.  Well water and an outhouse kind of set up. The land was eventually sold off.

One day around dusk, she said she saw a woman dressed in all black walking slowly to the farm house.  Black dress, black hat, black veil.  Didn't say anything, kept walking to them.  Apparently everyone freaked out ran in the house and locked the doors.  They looked out the windows and she kept walking.  When she got to the front porch, my mother said that she could hear the sound of chains being drug across the floor.  

Eventually the woman goes away and they never see her again.  But a few days later, my mother says a woman dressed in all white comes by the house.  She said that the woman spoke with them, wanted to know if they were okay and left.  My mother believed that her mother came back to checkup on her.
